headline: US Jury Ruling Puts Reddit’s Engagement Model Under New Scrutiny
summary: US jury ruling finds major social media platforms liable for product design features that contribute to user addiction, focusing on engagement driven tools. The case targets Meta and Alphabet, but it raises broader legal and regulatory questions for other engagement based platforms such as Reddit. This precedent introduces fresh uncertainty for Reddit’s business model, potential platform changes and future regulatory oversight. For investors looking at NYSE:RDDT, this ruling lands at a time...

headline: Lam Research Weighs AI Equipment Strength Against TurboQuant Memory Questions
summary: Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX) is highlighted for its role supplying equipment used to produce AI focused chips, drawing attention as demand for advanced etch and deposition tools intensifies. The company is in focus as investors weigh its strong AI related positioning against concerns that Google's TurboQuant algorithm could reduce memory requirements for certain workloads. Recent updates on Lam Research emphasize revenue growth tied to tools used in advanced memory and logic production for...
